creator: darius@dons.net.au
text:
Adds a dynamic sub-menu when the user selects Load Config to allow them to pick a
disk device (eg HD, USB Flash disk, CDROM, FDD) to load the install.cfg file from.

Fix: 

http://www.dons.net.au/~darius/sysinstall-disk-cfgload.diff
MD5 (sysinstall-disk-cfgload.diff) = c27e408ede4b63b89fad08a2b82d4b90
